Name: iFxaa
Description: Antialiasing (FXAA). Smooths out jagged edges, significantly blurs the screen. 0 - none, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high.

Name: iPostProcess
Description: Post Processing Filter. 0 - none, 1 - Light Sharpen, 2 - Strong Sharpen, 3 - MAKE MY EYES BLEED

Name: iHighDynamicRange
Description: High dynamic range (HDR) is a technique that produces images with a greater dynamic range of luminosity than standard dynamic range (SDR) images, allowing for realistic depictions of color and brightness. 0 - off, 1 - low, 2 - high

Name: bDepthEffects
Description: Depth of Field is a post-processing effect that simulates the focus properties of a camera lens.

Name: bAutoExposure
Description: Auto Exposure mimics how the human eye adjusts in varying levels of darkness.
